name: Peel Mining Limited
summary: Peel Mining Limited engages in the exploration of base and precious metals in the Cobar Region of New South Wales, Australia. It explores for copper, zinc, lead, silver, gold, and tungsten deposits. The company's principal projects include the Wagga Tank project located to the south of Cobar; the Mallee Bull copper project comprising an area of 80 square kilometers located in the central New South Wales; and the Cobar Superbasin project located in the Cobar Basin. Peel Mining Limited was founded in 2006 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
